info.title: NuGet Updater is a tool allowing the automatic update of the NuGet packages found in a solution

options.name: --solution
options.description:
The path to the solution or folder to update;
defaults to the current folder

options.name: --accessToken
--versions
options.description:
The target version to use; latest stable is always
considered; can be specified multiple times

options.name: --ignorePackages
options.description:
A specific package to ignore; can be specified
multiple times

options.name: --updatePackages
options.description:
A specific package to update; not specifying this
will update all packages found; can be specified

options.name: --packageAuthors
options.description:
A comma separated list of authors of the packages
to update; used for public packages only

options.name: --outputFile
options.description:
The path to a markdown file where the update
summary will be written

options.name: --useNuGetorg
options.description: Whether to use packages from NuGet.org

options.name: --silent
options.description: Suppress all output from NuGet Updater

options.name: --strict
options.description:
Whether to use versions with only the specified
version tag (ie. dev, but not dev.test)

options.name: --dryrun
options.description:
Runs the updater but doesn't write the updates to
files.

options.name: --result
options.description:
The path to the file where the update result
should be saved.

options.name: --versionOverrides
options.description:
The path to a JSON file to force specifc versions
to be used; format should be the same as the
result file

options.name: --updateProperties
options.description:
The path to a JSON file that lists pairs of csproj
property names and corresponding package Id, so
that updater can update project properties as
necessary
